description:
肖战身穿黑色西装，侧身低头，手扶着深蓝色绒面物体。他戴着戒指，袖口有品牌标志。

Xiao Zhan is wearing a black suit, turned to the side with his head down, his hand resting on a dark blue velvet surface. He is wearing a ring, and the brand logo is visible on his sleeve.

肖战身穿黑色西装，内搭黑色衬衫，佩戴银色项链和胸针。他头发蓬松，眼神专注，姿势优雅。

Xiao Zhan is wearing a black suit with a black shirt underneath, accessorized with a silver necklace and feather brooch. His hair is styled in a tousled manner, and he has a focused gaze, striking an elegant pose. The suit has a "BALMAIN" label on the sleeve.

肖战身穿黑色西装，内搭同色系丝绸质感衬衫，佩戴胸针和戒指，倚靠在倾斜的黑色椅子上。他头发蓬松，眼神专注，姿态优雅。

Xiao Zhan is wearing a black suit with a silky black shirt underneath. He is wearing a brooch and ring, and leaning on a tilted black chair. His hair is styled in a loose, voluminous way, and his gaze is focused and elegant.

Xiao Zhan is wearing a black suit with a silk shirt underneath, accessorized with a feather brooch and necklace. He is leaning against a black wooden chair, looking to the left with an elegant posture.

Xiao Zhan wears a black suit with a silver necklace and feather brooch. His hair is styled in a soft, tousled manner, and he has a gentle expression. The overall mood is elegant and refined.
